title: Admin Transaction History View
description: The system shall allow an admin to view the full transaction history of any user through the user management interface.
rationale: Enabling admins to view user transaction histories aids in auditing and investigation, ensuring compliance with internal policies and regulatory requirements.
business_value: Improves operational efficiency by providing quick access to critical financial and activity logs for audit purposes, reducing manual effort and potential errors.

source.description: As a admin I need view the full transaction history of any user So that aid in auditing and investigation

acceptance_criteria: I should see a complete list of that user's transactions
preconditions: I am logged in as an admin
functional_constraints: Transaction history includes all financial or activity logs for a selected user
Support searching or selecting a specific user
edge_cases: What happens if a user has no transaction history?
How does the system handle concurrent requests for multiple users' transaction histories?

interfaces.name: UserManagementAPI
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the UserManagementAPI to retrieve user details and initiate transaction history retrieval.

interfaces.name: TransactionLogDB
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with TransactionLogDB to fetch all financial or activity logs for a selected user.

test_cases.description: View transaction history for a user with transactions.
test_cases.expected_result: Admin should see a complete list of the user's transactions.

test_cases.description: Attempt to view transaction history for a user with no transactions.
test_cases.expected_result: Admin should see a message indicating that the user has no transaction history.
